failure_signature: Both gog-workspace and generic file-management skills triggered for a task involving organizing project files within a workspace directory
remedy: gog-workspace description should explicitly claim file organization within workspace directories and set higher priority than generic file skills.

failure_signature: Both markdown and docx skills competed when user asked to 'write a report' — ambiguous whether inline text or file deliverable was expected
remedy: markdown skill should explicitly exclude tasks requesting formal document files. docx should claim 'report', 'document', 'deliverable' keywords more aggressively.
